message:
chore: align test fixtures with asupersync migration, remove dead imports

- bakeoff.rs: replace "tokio" references with "asupersync" in test
  corpus documents and queries to match the actual dependency migration
- lib.rs: remove unused semver::Version and Deserialize imports,
  change progress callback from Box<dyn Fn> to Arc<dyn Fn> matching
  the ProgressCallback type alias, update comment to reference
  "asupersync runtime"
- search/query.rs: remove unused BatchExt import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
